title: StickKiller [Archived]
description: Have you ever felt frightened when killing mobs? This plugin will allow you to kill mobs within a 30-radius by right-clicking a stick.
body:
## StickKiller Plugin
This plugin can be utilized for entertainment or to play pranks on your friends, such as by disrupting their mob farm, cow farm, and more.

# Notes
# Project discontinued due to personal reasons.
